title: ruta stocksiana
intro: Ruta stocksiana, also known as common rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds like borneol, camphor, and thymol, possessing anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ruta stocksiana include its ability to aid digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ruta stocksiana include teas, infusions, and topical creams, often used to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne, as well as to repel insects and relieve joint pain.
